## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the motivation behind them. Include any relevant background context or issues that this PR resolves.

Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

Please mark the options that are relevant:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Refactoring / Chore

## Verification and Testing

### Automated Checks
- [ ] Running `python scripts/validate_data.py` passes successfully.

### Manual Verification
Describe the tests/verifications you ran to verify your changes:
- (e.g., ran scraper locally for `ethereum` and verified the output CSV rows)
- (e.g., served local server and checked that UI rendered correctly in Chrome/Firefox)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code expectations of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly if necessary.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors.
